nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pied butcherbird
nodes.summary: Pied butcherbird（Pied butcherbird，学名 Cracticus nigrogularis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pied butcherbird (Cracticus nigrogularis) is a songbird native to Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Bomen Lagoon, North Wagga Wagga, New South Wales The pied butcherbird is found across much of Australia, except for the far south of the mainland and Tasmania. It is only rarely recorded in the Sydney Basin and absent from the Illawarra, Southern Tablelands, and south coast of New South Wales

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Victoria, it is found along the Murray Valley and west of Chiltern. In South Australia, it is not found in the north-east of the state nor on the Adelaide plain
